translations.en: a pipe-smoking gentleman with the symbol of the Codex @tattooed on his forehead.
translations.zh: 一位叼著菸斗的紳士，額頭上刺有守則之書的@符號。

translations.en: "Greetings to you, $G."
translations.zh: 「$G，幸會幸會。」

translations.en: "My name is Manrel."
translations.zh: 「吾名曼瑞爾。」

translations.en: "I'm a @woodworker. I also dabble in @alchemy from time to time."
translations.zh: 「吾是@木工匠人，也不時涉足@煉金術。」

translations.en: "I make furniture, cabinets, walking sticks, and the like."
translations.zh: 「吾製造家具、櫥櫃、手杖之類的物品。」

translations.en: "Perhaps I can make something for you someday."
translations.zh: 「或許他日吾能為汝製作些什麼。」

translations.en: "I'm trying to learn how to make healing potions, but I don't have the formula right yet."
translations.zh: 「吾正嘗試學習配製療傷藥水，但配方尚未完善。」

translations.en: "I did stumble across a wicked recipe for red @mead, though."
translations.zh: 「倒是偶然摸索出一個絕妙的紅@蜂蜜酒配方。」

translations.en: "Alas, there's little call for my brew in this town, with the Blue @Bottle serving Frasier's @Folly."
translations.zh: 「可惜此城對吾釀製的酒需求甚少——藍@瓶酒館供應弗雷澤之@愚醇，人皆趨之若鶩。」

translations.en: "A fine establishment."
translations.zh: 「那是一家好店。」

translations.en: "One of the finest @libations you'll find anywhere."
translations.zh: 「此乃天下最醇美的@美酒之一。」

translations.en: "Libation or liability - take your pick."
translations.zh: 「美酒也好，禍水也罷——隨汝選擇。」

translations.en: "I went drinking with some friends the night we heard of the discovery of the Codex."
translations.zh: 「聽聞守則之書出土的那晚，吾與幾位友人一同痛飲。」

translations.en: "When I woke up the next morning, I had this tattoo..."
translations.zh: 「翌日醒來，吾身上便多了這個刺青……」

translations.en: "@Daffodils were always his favorites... It's too bad I couldn't find any."
translations.zh: 「@水仙花一向是他的最愛……可惜吾找不到任何一朵。」

translations.en: "Yes, daffodils."
translations.zh: 「是的，水仙花。」

translations.en: "Take care, my dear. I hope I'll see you again soon."
translations.zh: 「保重，親愛的。盼能再次與汝相見。」

translations.en: "It was a pleasure speaking with you."
translations.zh: 「與汝交談甚是愉快。」

translations.en: "I can't help you with that."
translations.zh: 「此事吾幫不上汝。」

translations.en: "I hope you got a chance to deliver the @flowers."
translations.zh: 「希望汝已有機會送去那束@花。」

translations.en: "Oh, have you been to visit my cousin's grave?"
translations.zh: 「哦，汝可曾去探視過吾表兄的墳墓？」

translations.en: "My mistake."
translations.zh: 「吾弄錯了。」

translations.en: He looks at you suspiciously. "You wouldn't be wanting the key to his crypt, would you?"
translations.zh: 他狐疑地打量著汝。「汝不會是想要他地穴的鑰匙吧？」

translations.en: "Well, alright then."
translations.zh: 「好吧，那便如此。」

translations.en: "You're carrying too much right now. Come back for it later."
translations.zh: 「汝目前攜帶過多物品。稍後再來取吧。」

translations.en: "Well, perhaps you have your reasons... Okay, you can have the key."
translations.zh: 「嗯，或許汝自有緣由……好吧，鑰匙給汝。」

translations.en: "But you have to take these @flowers and leave them there."
translations.zh: 「但汝必須帶上這些@花，放在那裡。」

translator_notes: 曼瑞爾是木工兼煉金術愛好者，語氣隨和親切。Manrel 已在 glossary。Beyvin 的表兄故事提供重要線索（墓穴鑰匙）。libation/liability 雙關以「美酒也好，禍水也罷」意譯。
